name: Finance & Accounting
description: AI-assisted bookkeeping, reconciliation, cashflow forecasting, and internal audit for accounting firms and finance teams. Human-in-the-loop on every payment, journal entry, and period close.

agents.name: accounting-coordinator
agents.description: Maintains the engagement register, period-close calendar, and cross-engagement task tracker. Routes documents and flags open items.

agents.name: bookkeeping
agents.description: Classifies transactions, drafts journal entries, and routes coding questions.

agents.name: reconciliation
agents.description: Bank and ledger reconciliation — matches statements to posted entries, surfaces breaks.

agents.name: ap-ar
agents.description: Manages payables and receivables aging, payment-run drafts, and dunning notices.

agents.name: cashflow
agents.description: 13-week cashflow forecast, scenario analysis, and variance commentary.

agents.name: audit
agents.description: Internal audit sampling, findings drafting, and review-pass tracking.

agents.name: reporting
agents.description: Drafts P&L, balance sheet, and management accounts from ledger data.

subagents.name: ocr-extractor
subagents.description: Extracts structured data from scanned invoices and statements.

subagents.name: gl-classifier
subagents.description: Classifies transactions against the chart of accounts.

subagents.name: variance-analyzer
subagents.description: Computes budget-vs-actual variances and flags outliers.

subagents.name: evidence-collector
subagents.description: Pulls supporting documents for audit samples and reconciliations.

subagents.name: reviewer
subagents.description: Performs a second-pass review of draft outputs before approval.

inspirations.title: Month-end close status
inspirations.prompt: What's the state of this month's close? What's on track, what's slipping, and what decisions do I need to make today?

inspirations.title: 13-week cashflow forecast
inspirations.prompt: Build a 13-week cashflow forecast from our latest AR aging and AP schedule. Flag any weeks where we dip below £50k operating buffer.

inspirations.title: Bank reconciliation
inspirations.prompt: Reconcile our main operating account against the June ledger. List every unmatched item and suggest a coding for each.

inspirations.title: AP aging and payment run
inspirations.prompt: Show me our AP aging over 60 days. Draft a payment run for everything over 45 days that isn't in dispute.

inspirations.title: Internal audit sample
inspirations.prompt: Run a MUS sample on our Q2 journal entries. Produce a findings draft with any items over materiality threshold flagged for partner review.

inspirations.title: Management accounts draft
inspirations.prompt: Draft May management accounts — P&L vs budget, balance sheet, and a one-page commentary on the three largest variances.
